text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The collaboration software connects with a version history system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Version History Integration", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrate the collaboration software with a version history system.

### Descrição Técnica
The system should allow users to view and manage changes made to documents, notes, and other content. The integration should be robust and handle concurrent updates.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select a suitable version history system.
- [ ] Develop API endpoints for retrieving and updating version history data.
- [ ] Implement data synchronization and conflict resolution mechanisms.
- [ ] Test the integration with various scenarios and edge cases.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The subscription billing platform features a revenue recognition system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Revenue Recognition System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a revenue recognition system for the subscription billing platform.

### Technical Description
The system will be responsible for tracking and recognizing revenue from subscription sales. It will need to integrate with the existing billing system and provide real-time reporting.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the revenue recognition system architecture
- [ ] Implement revenue tracking and recognition logic
- [ ] Integrate with existing billing system
- [ ] Develop real-time reporting features
- [ ] Test and validate the system", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Subscription Billing Platform API", "body": "### Objective
Create a RESTful API for the subscription billing platform to handle subscription management and revenue recognition.

### Technical Description
The API will need to provide endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting subscriptions, as well as handling revenue recognition and reporting.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API architecture
- [ ] Implement API endpoints for subscription management
- [ ] Implement API endpoints for revenue recognition and reporting
- [ ] Test and validate the API", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Database Design", "body": "### Objective
Design a database schema for the subscription billing platform to store subscription data and revenue recognition information.

### Technical Description
The database will need to support the revenue recognition system and provide real-time reporting capabilities.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the database schema
- [ ] Implement database tables and relationships
- [ ] Test and validate the database", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline", "body": "### Objective
Set up a CI/CD pipeline for the subscription billing platform to automate testing, building, and deployment of the platform.

### Technical Description
The pipeline will need to integrate with the revenue recognition system and API, and provide automated testing and deployment for the platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up the CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Integrate pipeline with revenue recognition system and API
- [ ] Configure automated testing and deployment", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Frontend Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop a user-friendly frontend for the subscription billing platform to manage subscriptions and view revenue recognition information.

### Technical Description
The frontend will need to integrate with the API and provide a user-friendly interface for subscription management and revenue recognition reporting.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the frontend architecture
- [ ] Implement frontend UI and UX
- [ ] Integrate with API and revenue recognition system
- [ ] Test and validate the frontend", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The warehouse management software integrates with a barcode scanning system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de leitura de códigos de barras", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de gestão de armazém com o sistema de leitura de códigos de barras.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de leitura de códigos de barras é responsável por fornecer informações sobre os produtos que estão sendo armazenados ou movimentados no armazém. É necessário que o software de gestão de armazém seja capaz de processar essas informações e atualizar automaticamente seu estado.

### Tasks
- [ ] Desenvolver API para integração com o sistema de leitura de códigos de barras.
- [ ] Implementar lógica para processar informações vindas do sistema de leitura de códigos de barras.
- [ ] Testar a integração com diferentes tipos de produtos e situações de armazenamento.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Armazenamento de dados de armazém", "body": "### Objetivo
Armazenar os dados de armazém de forma segura e eficiente.

### Descrição Técnica
É necessário que os dados de armazém sejam armazenados de forma que possam ser facilmente recuperados e processados. Além disso, é necessário garantir a segurança dos dados contra perdas ou acessos indevidos.

### Tasks
- [ ] Desenvolver schema de banco de dados para armazenamento de dados de armazém.
- [ ] Implementar criptografia e autenticação para proteger os dados de armazém.
- [ ] Testar a integração com a API de integração com o sistema de leitura de códigos de barras.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}, {"title": "Integração com sistema de gerenciamento de estoque", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de gestão de armazém com o sistema de gerenciamento de estoque.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de gerenciamento de estoque é responsável por fornecer informações sobre a quantidade de produtos em estoque. É necessário que o software de gestão de armazém seja capaz de processar essas informações e atualizar automaticamente seu estado.

### Tasks
- [ ] Desenvolver API para integração com o sistema de gerenciamento de estoque.
- [ ] Implementar lógica para processar informações vindas do sistema de gerenciamento de estoque.
- [ ] Testar a integração com diferentes tipos de produtos e situações de armazenamento.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The server management platform connects with a server monitoring system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Server Management Platform Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the server management platform with a server monitoring system to enable real-time monitoring and management of servers.

### Technical Description
The platform will use REST APIs to communicate with the monitoring system. The integration will require the development of a custom API client to interact with the monitoring system's API. The API client will be responsible for sending and receiving data to/from the monitoring system.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop a custom API client to interact with the server monitoring system's API.
- [ ] Implement API calls to send and receive data to/from the monitoring system.
- [ ] Test the integration with the server monitoring system.
- [ ] Deploy the integration to production.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The photo management software features a facial recognition system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Implement Facial Recognition System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate facial recognition system into photo management software.

### Technical Description
Develop a facial recognition module that can identify and tag individuals in photos. This module will be integrated with the existing photo management system.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conduct research on existing facial recognition algorithms and choose the most suitable one.
- [ ] Design and implement the facial recognition module.
- [ ] Integrate the facial recognition module with the existing photo management system.
- [ ] Test the facial recognition module with a set of test images.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The online invoicing platform integrates with a payment processing system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Payment Gateway Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the online invoicing platform with a payment processing system.

### Technical Description
The platform will need to establish a secure connection with the payment gateway to handle payment processing. This will involve implementing APIs and handling payment responses.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select a suitable payment processing system.
- [ ] Implement API integration with the payment gateway.
- [ ] Handle payment responses and notifications.
- [ ] Test API integration with payment processing system.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The social media monitoring tool connects with a hashtag tracking system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Hashtag Tracking System Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the social media monitoring tool with a hashtag tracking system.

### Technical Description
The integration will require API connections to retrieve hashtag data and update the social media monitoring tool's database.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research hashtag tracking systems and select a suitable one.
- [ ] Develop API connections to retrieve hashtag data.
- [ ] Update the social media monitoring tool's database to reflect hashtag data.
- [ ] Test the integration with sample data.
- [ ] Deploy the integration to production.

Labels: ["backend", "api"]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Social Media Monitoring Tool Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop a social media monitoring tool that connects with a hashtag tracking system.

### Technical Description
The tool will require a backend to handle API connections, a frontend to display data, and a database to store data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the tool's architecture.
- [ ] Develop the backend API to retrieve social media data.
- [ ] Develop the frontend to display data.
- [ ] Design and implement the database schema.
- [ ] Test the tool with sample data.
- [ ] Deploy the tool to production.

Labels: ["backend", "frontend", "database"]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Infrastructure Setup", "body": "### Objective
Set up the infrastructure for the social media monitoring tool.

### Technical Description
The infrastructure will require a cloud provider, a database, and a load balancer.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up the cloud provider (e.g. AWS, GCP).
- [ ] Set up the database (e.g. MySQL, PostgreSQL).
- [ ] Set up the load balancer (e.g. ELB, HAProxy).
- [ ] Configure the infrastructure for high availability and scalability.
- [ ] Test the infrastructure.

Labels: ["infrastructure", "cloud"]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline Setup", "body": "### Objective
Set up a CI/CD pipeline for the social media monitoring tool.

### Technical Description
The pipeline will require a CI tool (e.g. Jenkins, CircleCI) and a CD tool (e.g. Terraform, Ansible).

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up the CI tool to automate testing and building.
- [ ] Set up the CD tool to automate deployments.
- [ ] Configure the pipeline for automated testing and deployment.
- [ ] Test the pipeline.

Labels: ["ci/cd", "infrastructure"]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Testing and Quality Assurance", "body": "### Objective
Develop a testing strategy for the social media monitoring tool.

### Technical Description
The testing strategy will require unit tests, integration tests, and UI tests.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop unit tests for the backend API.
- [ ] Develop integration tests for the frontend and backend.
- [ ] Develop UI tests for the frontend.
- [ ] Test the tool with sample data.
- [ ] Review and iterate on the testing strategy.

Labels: ["testing", "quality assurance"]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The 3D design software features a rendering system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Rendering System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a rendering system for the 3D design software.

### Technical Description
The rendering system should be able to render 3D scenes with various objects, lights, and materials. It should also support animations and allow for customization of rendering settings.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the rendering system architecture.
- [ ] Develop the rendering engine to support various 3D formats.
- [ ] Implement lighting and material rendering.
- [ ] Add animation support to the rendering system.
- [ ] Develop a user interface for the rendering system.
- [ ] Integrate the rendering system with the 3D design software.

Labels: [backend, api, 3d-design]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The product review platform integrates with a sentiment scoring system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate Sentiment Scoring System", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrate the sentiment scoring system with the product review platform.

### Descrição Técnica
The integration will involve calling the sentiment scoring API and processing the response to display the sentiment scores for each review.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and choose the sentiment scoring API to be used.
- [ ] Implement the API calls in the product review platform.
- [ ] Process the response from the sentiment scoring API and display the sentiment scores for each review.
- [ ] Test the integration to ensure it is functioning correctly.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The marketing campaign software connects with a campaign performance analysis system.

### Response:
[{"title": "API Integration: Marketing Campaign to Performance Analysis", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the marketing campaign software with the campaign performance analysis system.

### Technical Description
The integration will require the creation of APIs for both systems to communicate. The APIs will need to be designed with security and scalability in mind.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement APIs for marketing campaign and performance analysis systems.
- [ ] Implement API calls for data exchange between systems.
- [ ] Test API integration for correctness and performance.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Data Model: Campaign Performance Analysis", "body": "### Objective
 Define the data model for the campaign performance analysis system.

### Technical Description
The data model will require the identification of relevant data entities and relationships. The model will need to be designed with scalability and performance in mind.

### Tasks
- [ ] Define data entities and relationships for campaign performance analysis.
- [ ] Design and implement database schema for storing campaign performance data.
- [ ] Test data model for correctness and performance.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}, {"title": "Frontend Development: Campaign Performance Analysis UI", "body": "### Objective
 Develop a user interface for the campaign performance analysis system.

### Technical Description
The frontend will require the creation of a responsive and user-friendly interface for viewing campaign performance data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement UI components for campaign performance analysis.
- [ ] Implement user interactions for filtering and sorting campaign performance data.
- [ ] Test frontend UI for usability and performance.", "labels": ["frontend", "ui"]}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline: Marketing Campaign Software", "body": "### Objective
 Set up a continuous integration and continuous deployment pipeline for the marketing campaign software.

### Technical Description
The pipeline will require the integration of automated testing and deployment scripts. The pipeline will need to be designed with scalability and reliability in mind.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up automated testing and deployment scripts for marketing campaign software.
- [ ] Configure CI/CD pipeline for continuous integration and deployment.
- [ ] Test CI/CD pipeline for correctness and performance.", "labels": ["ci/cd", "testing"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The business process management tool features a process modeling system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Implementação do Processo de Modelagem de Fluxos", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar o processo de modelagem de fluxos para o business process management tool.

### Descrição Técnica
O processo de modelagem de fluxos deve permitir que os usuários criem, editem e gerenciem processos de negócios. Isso inclui a capacidade de adicionar e remover etapas, adicionar condicionais e loops, e configurar as regras de workflow.

### Tasks
- [ ] Criar a arquitetura do processo de modelagem de fluxos.
- [ ] Implementar a lógica de negócios para o processo de modelagem de fluxos.
- [ ] Integrar o processo de modelagem de fluxos com o banco de dados.
- [ ] Criar APIs para gerenciar os processos de modelagem de fluxos.
- [ ] Implementar testes para o processo de modelagem de fluxos.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Desenvolvimento da API de Processos de Modelagem", "body": "### Objetivo
Desenvolver a API para gerenciar os processos de modelagem de fluxos.

### Descrição Técnica
A API deve permitir que os usuários criem, leiam e atualizem processos de modelagem de fluxos. Isso inclui a capacidade de gerenciar as etapas, condicionais e loops, e configurar as regras de workflow.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar a API para gerenciar os processos de modelagem de fluxos.
- [ ] Integrar a API com o banco de dados.
- [ ] Implementar testes para a API.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Integração com Banco de Dados", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o processo de modelagem de fluxos com o banco de dados.

### Descrição Técnica
O processo de modelagem de fluxos deve ser integrado com o banco de dados para armazenar e recuperar os processos de modelagem de fluxos.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar a integração com o banco de dados.
- [ ] Criar APIs para gerenciar os processos de modelagem de fluxos.
- [ ] Implementar testes para a integração.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The mobile device management software integrates with a device enrollment system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Mobile Device Management API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the mobile device management software with a device enrollment system.

### Technical Description
The integration requires the development of a RESTful API to facilitate the exchange of data between the two systems. The API will need to handle device enrollment, device status updates, and device deprovisioning.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the RESTful API using a suitable programming language (e.g., Python or Node.js).
- [ ] Integrate the API with the device enrollment system.
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms for the API.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing of the API to ensure its stability and reliability.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The document conversion tool connects with a file format detection system.

### Response:
[{"title": "File Format Detection System Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the file format detection system with the document conversion tool.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve connecting to the file format detection system API, retrieving the file format information, and then using this information to determine the conversion process.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research file format detection system API and documentation.
- [ ] Develop API client in [programming language] to interact with the file format detection system.
- [ ] Implement file format information retrieval and conversion process determination.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "API Client Development", "body": "### Objective
Develop an API client in [programming language] to interact with the file format detection system.

### Technical Description
The API client will be responsible for sending requests to the file format detection system API, processing the responses, and handling any errors that may occur.

### Tasks
- [ ] Choose a suitable API client library or framework.
- [ ] Implement API client functionality for sending requests and processing responses.
- [ ] Test the API client with sample data.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "File Format Information Retrieval", "body": "### Objective
Retrieve file format information from the file format detection system API.

### Technical Description
The file format information will be used to determine the conversion process for the document conversion tool.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research the file format detection system API and determine the endpoint and parameters required to retrieve file format information.
- [ ] Implement code to send a request to the API and retrieve the file format information.
- [ ] Validate the retrieved file format information.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The e-commerce software features a cart abandonment tracking system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Implementar Cart Abandonment Tracking System", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar um sistema de tracking de abandono de carrinho de compras para melhorar a experiência do usuário e identificar oportunidades de conversão.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema deve ser capaz de registrar e armazenar informações sobre carrinhos de compras abandonados, incluindo o tempo de abandono e as ações realizadas pelo usuário antes de abandonar o carrinho. Além disso, o sistema deve permitir a análise de dados para identificar padrões e oportunidades de melhoria.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design e implementação do banco de dados para armazenar dados de carrinhos de compras abandonados.
- [ ] Implementação da lógica de negócios para registrar e armazenar informações sobre carrinhos de compras abandonados.
- [ ] Desenvolvimento da interface para a análise de dados e identificação de oportunidades de melhoria.
- [ ] Integração com a API do sistema de e-commerce para obter informações sobre carrinhos de compras.
- [ ] Testes de unidade e integração para garantir a qualidade do sistema.

labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

- [ ] Test the integration with the heatmap generation system.

Labels: [backend, api, integration]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

- [ ] Develop the approval notification system.

### Input:
The email encryption platform integrates with a key management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Email Encryption Platform Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the email encryption platform with a key management system.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve API calls to the key management system to retrieve and manage encryption keys. The email encryption platform will need to be modified to handle the returned keys and encrypt/decrypt emails accordingly.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API integration with the key management system.
- [ ] Implement the key handling and encryption/decryption logic in the email encryption platform.
- [ ] Test the integration to ensure secure key management and email encryption/decryption.
", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}]

### Input:
The IT monitoring software connects with a log management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Log Management System", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o IT monitoring software com um sistema de gerenciamento de logs para coletar e analisar dados de logs.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração deve ser feita utilizando a API do sistema de gerenciamento de logs, enviando requisições HTTP para coletar e analisar logs. Deve ser desenvolvido um módulo que permita ao usuário filtrar e analisar os logs coletados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar ao sistema de gerenciamento de logs utilizando a API.
- [ ] Desenvolver módulo de análise de logs.
- [ ] Implementar filtro para logs.
- [ ] Realizar testes de integração.
- [ ] Documentar a integração.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The inventory optimization platform features a demand forecasting system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Demand Forecasting System", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement a demand forecasting system for the inventory optimization platform.

### Technical Description
The system should be able to analyze historical sales data, seasonality, and trends to predict future demand. The forecasting algorithm should be scalable and able to handle large datasets.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and implement a suitable forecasting algorithm (e.g. ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM).
- [ ] Integrate the forecasting algorithm with the inventory optimization platform's data storage and processing systems.
- [ ] Implement data preprocessing and feature engineering techniques to improve forecasting accuracy.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing and validation of the forecasting system with real-world data.
- [ ] Implement monitoring and logging mechanisms to track the forecasting system's performance and detect any errors or anomalies.
- [ ] Document the forecasting system's architecture, design decisions, and implementation details.
", "labels": ["backend", "data-science", "forecasting"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The endpoint security software integrates with a threat intelligence system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de inteligência de ameaças", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o endpoint security software com o sistema de inteligência de ameaças para fornecer informações de ameaças mais precisas.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de inteligência de ameaças fornece informações de ameaças em tempo real, que precisam ser integrradas ao endpoint security software para que ele possa tomar decisões mais informadas.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar-se ao sistema de inteligência de ameaças utilizando API.
- [ ] Processar e analisar dados de ameaças recebidos do sistema de inteligência de ameaças.
- [ ] Integrar os dados de ameaças ao endpoint security software.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The software testing platform connects with a test case management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate with Test Case Management System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the software testing platform with a test case management system to enable seamless data exchange and tracking.

### Technical Description
The integration will be achieved through API calls, leveraging the RESTful API provided by the test case management system. The platform will receive test case information, such as test case ID, description, and execution status, and update the system accordingly.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop API integration using RESTful API
- [ ] Implement data mapping and validation for test case information", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "API Design and Implementation", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement a robust and scalable API for the software testing platform, enabling seamless communication with the test case management system.

### Technical Description
The API will be built using [insert technology stack] and will support CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations. The API will be designed to handle high traffic and will include features such as caching, rate limiting, and logging.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design API architecture and API endpoints
- [ ] Implement API using [insert technology stack]
- [ ] Integrate API with test case management system", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Database Schema and Migration", "body": "### Objective
